fixes_this_run: AB_GATE_HASH_COLUMN: Added ab_gate_hash to TradeLedger LEDGER_COLUMNS (feedback/trade_ledger.py). Stable 0-99 integer derived from trade_id hex hash. Auto-computed in record_trade(). Syntax verified. Tested: trade 'abc123def456' -> hash 26, range 0-99 confirmed.

AUTO_FIX_WIRED_INTO_LOOP: AutoFixPipeline imported + instantiated in FeedbackLoop.__init__(). evaluate_active_fixes() called every 20 trades in record_outcome() (step 7). All 3 files AST-parsed clean.

high_priority_findings.finding: AB_TRACKING_BROKEN fixed: ab_gate_hash column added to TradeLedger schema + AutoFixPipeline wired into FeedbackLoop.record_outcome(). 59 A/B_ACTIVE rules in graduated_rules.json were frozen with null treatment_wr. On restart, every 20 trades will trigger evaluate_active_fixes() which will auto-revert bad rules (WR delta < -3pp) and promote good ones (delta > +2pp).

high_priority_findings.estimated_impact: Unblocks graduation pipeline for 59 queued rules including streak_momentum_gate (74-77% WR after wins), BB_solo_signal_boost (67.6% WR), ETH_SHORT_BB_golden (70% WR). Estimated +5-15pp improvement once best rules graduate.

high_priority_findings.finding: Bot offline 10.9 days. 7 graduated rules armed. AB tracking now wired. Restart is the only path to new data.

2. python -c 'from llm.graduated_rules import get_graduated_rules_engine; e=get_graduated_rules_engine(); print(e.get_stats())' → 7 active rules
3. python run.py paper (soft-start: 50% size, 3x max leverage for first 5 trades)
4. Within first 20 signals: check rejection_tracker.json for HYPE/SOL/night vetoes
5. At trade #20: check logs for '[FEEDBACK] AB eval' line confirming first evaluation
